query_normalized: investigating the impact of code ownership on llm code understanding computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on improving Code LLM performance through instruction fine-tuning (Evol-Instruct) and benchmarking on standard code generation tasks, but it does not measure, analyze, or discuss "code ownership" (e.g., developer attribution, repository contribution patterns, or ownership metrics) as an independent variable affecting model understanding.
